channel.title: Story Never End — Classic Literature
channel.description: Timeless world classics, retold as audio theatre. Dorian Gray's vanity, Kafka's alienation, Jekyll and Hyde's double life — one work per episode, for listening with your eyes closed.
channel.itunes:summary: Timeless world classics, retold as audio theatre. Dorian Gray's vanity, Kafka's alienation, Jekyll and Hyde's double life — one work per episode, for listening with your eyes closed.
channel.itunes:author: Story Never End

item.title: Pride and Prejudice
item.description: Pride and Prejudice — An audio-theatre retelling of «Pride and Prejudice».
item.itunes:summary: Pride and Prejudice — An audio-theatre retelling of «Pride and Prejudice».

item.title: The Metamorphosis
item.description: The Metamorphosis — An audio-theatre retelling of «The Metamorphosis».
item.itunes:summary: The Metamorphosis — An audio-theatre retelling of «The Metamorphosis».

item.title: Dr Jekyll and Mr Hyde
item.description: Dr Jekyll and Mr Hyde — An audio-theatre retelling of «Dr Jekyll and Mr Hyde».
item.itunes:summary: Dr Jekyll and Mr Hyde — An audio-theatre retelling of «Dr Jekyll and Mr Hyde».

item.title: The Time Machine
item.description: The Time Machine — An audio-theatre retelling of «The Time Machine».
item.itunes:summary: The Time Machine — An audio-theatre retelling of «The Time Machine».
